sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: DTE Energy Links Data Center Growth To Two Year Rate Pause
feed.summary: DTE Energy plans to file its next rate case and then implement a two-year pause on additional electric rate increase requests, attributing this decision to the affordability benefits derived from new data center developments in its Michigan service territory. This strategy aims to balance grid investment needs with customer bill pressures, with large data centers expected to fund their own connections. The company believes that higher, more stable usage from data centers can support grid investment economics and potentially reduce the need for frequent widespread rate increases, offering potential benefits for investors seeking regulated returns.

feed.title: Is CRA International (CRAI) Shares Offering Value After This Year’s 25% Pullback?
feed.summary: CRA International (CRAI) stock has experienced a 25% decline year-to-date, prompting a re-evaluation of its value. While a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the shares are undervalued by 53.8% at around $150 per share, its current P/E of 18.0x is above Simply Wall St's Fair Ratio of 14.0x, indicating potential overvaluation based on this metric. The article encourages investors to consider multiple valuation approaches and outlines how to use Simply Wall St's "Narratives" feature for a more personalized analysis.

feed.title: Assessing Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp (FITB) has seen significant share price momentum, with a 0.7% gain recently and 10.7% over the past month, leading to a 47.3% total shareholder return over one year. The bank is currently trading at $50.89, which is 12.6% below the average analyst target and suggests a 46.5% intrinsic discount. While expansion in fast-growing Southeast markets is expected to drive growth, potential headwinds include slower commercial loan demand and increased fintech competition.

feed.title: Pension fund units credited to Grupo Cibest (CIB) board director
feed.summary: Grupo Cibest S.A. director Sylvia Escovar Gomez indirectly acquired 301.6 units in the Grupo Cibest Equity Securities Fund on April 20, 2026, through a voluntary cash contribution to an institutional pension fund. These units, valued at approximately $7.26 each, are part of a fund administered by an independent third-party manager, over which Escovar has no voting or investment discretion. The fund primarily invests in Grupo Cibest common and preferred shares, and units are payable solely in cash upon withdrawal.

feed.title: Securities Fraud Investigation Into Calix, Inc. (CALX) Announced – Shareholders Who Lost Money Urged To Contact The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz
feed.summary: The Law Offices of Frank R. Cruz has announced an investigation into Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) regarding potential violations of federal securities laws. This follows Calix's Q1 2026 earnings report, which revealed a sequential decline in non-GAAP gross margin and a negative outlook for future gross margins due to increased memory component costs, leading to a significant drop in its stock price. Shareholders who incurred losses are encouraged to contact the firm to inquire about pursuing a claim.

feed.title: CubeSmart opens new 90,000-square-foot self-storage facility in New Braunfels
feed.summary: CubeSmart Self Storage has opened its second location in New Braunfels, a new 90,000-square-foot facility at 2265 Hwy. 46. The new location, which broke ground in February 2025 and opened on March 17, offers various storage options including climate-controlled and RV storage. CubeSmart also has an existing facility at 1150 Loop 337 in New Braunfels.

feed.title: Assessing Pool Corporation (POOL) Valuation After Mixed Short And Long Term Share Performance
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) has experienced mixed share performance, with a recent monthly gain but longer-term declines. Despite trading at a discount to one intrinsic estimate, its P/E ratio of 20.8x is above the industry average, indicating potential valuation risk. The article suggests investors should conduct their own analysis, focusing on key rewards and warning signs, and offers lists of other investment opportunities.

feed.title: Is Crown Castle’s Tower Focus And Asset Sales Strategy Reframing The Investment Case For CCI?
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (NYSE: CCI) recently reported Q1 2026 results and reaffirmed its full-year guidance, which includes an expected net loss. The company is progressing with the sale of its small cell and fiber businesses to focus on its U.S. tower model, alongside cost reductions and legal recovery efforts. This strategic shift frames the investment case, with future performance dependent on the successful completion of asset sales and the implementation of its capital allocation plan.

feed.title: Bank of Hawaii Corp. Hits New 52-Week High at $81.26
feed.summary: Bank of Hawaii Corp. has achieved a new 52-week high of USD 81.26 on April 17, 2026, marking a significant milestone in its performance. The company has seen a strong 44.33% increase over the past year, outperforming the S&P 500. With a market capitalization of USD 4,182 million, a P/E ratio of 20.00, and a dividend yield of 2.66%, Bank of Hawaii Corp. demonstrates a solid financial position.

feed.title: BioMarin set to acquire Amicus after regulatory clearance
feed.summary: BioMarin Pharmaceutical is set to acquire Amicus Therapeutics after receiving final regulatory clearance from the French Ministry of Economics and Finance on April 23, 2026. This merger, initially agreed upon in December 2025, is expected to close on April 27, 2026, and represents a strategic expansion for BioMarin in rare-disease therapeutics. A recent analyst rating on BMRN stock is a Buy with a $105.00 price target, though Spark's AI Analyst gives BMRN a "Neutral" rating due to mixed technical signals and demanding valuation, despite strong financial fundamentals.

feed.title: Elevating Transparency: Introducing the Palo Alto Networks SASE Health Portal
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks has launched its new SASE Health Portal to enhance transparency and provide customers with real-time visibility into their Prisma SASE architecture. The portal offers dynamic geographic monitoring, granular component-level insights, and proactive incident/maintenance awareness, aiming to reduce alert fatigue and improve operational focus. It also features a resilient, cross-platform disaster recovery architecture to ensure continuous access to service health information.

feed.title: Popular: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Popular Inc. (BPOP) reported strong first-quarter earnings of $245.7 million, or $3.78 per share, surpassing analyst expectations of $3.30 per share. Despite missing revenue forecasts for net interest expense, the company posted a total revenue of $1.11 billion for the period. Popular Inc.'s stock has seen significant growth, increasing 19% year-to-date and 66% over the past 12 months.

feed.title: Principal Financial: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group Inc. (PFG) reported strong first-quarter net income of $424.6 million, or $1.93 per share, with adjusted earnings of $2.07 per share, surpassing analyst expectations. However, the company's posted revenue of $3.53 billion, and adjusted revenue of $3.52 billion, did not meet Street forecasts. This financial news was generated by Automated Insights using data from Zacks Investment Research.

feed.title: Credicorp (NYSE: BAP) sets S/50 per share dividend from 2025 earnings
feed.summary: Credicorp Ltd. has approved a significant cash dividend of S/50.0000 per share, totaling S/4,719,115,850.00, from its 2025 net income. This dividend will be paid on June 12, 2026, to shareholders of record on May 18, 2026, in U.S. dollars and will not be subject to withholding tax at source. The decision represents a substantial return of earnings to shareholders, following an initial allocation to voluntary reserves and retained earnings.

feed.title: Acuity Brands Outdoor LED Lighting Helps Wisconsin Healthcare Provider Achieve Energy Savings Goals
feed.summary: ThedaCare health system, a Wisconsin-based healthcare provider, selected outdoor LED lighting from Acuity Brands to enhance safety, reduce energy consumption, and lower maintenance costs at two of its campuses. By replacing 84 high-pressure sodium and metal halide fixtures with 60 D-Series LED luminaires from Lithonia Lighting, the system expects to save over $40,000 annually in energy costs. The project, including D-Series Area LED luminaires, Wallpacks, Floodlights, and Parking Garage luminaires, also significantly improved light quality and security camera visibility while reducing light pollution.

feed.title: Colony Bankcorp (CBAN) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
feed.summary: Colony Bankcorp (CBAN) reported a solid start to 2026, successfully completing its core system conversion and customer integration following the TC Federal merger, leading to increased operating income and improved efficiency. The company is now focused on organic growth, leveraging complementary business lines like Colony Financial Advisors, mortgage, and insurance, which saw significant pretax income increases. Management anticipates further operational improvements and is actively evaluating strategic acquisition opportunities within Georgia and neighboring states, while also maintaining a strong focus on asset quality and deposit growth.

feed.title: Kroger drops new savings for customers as grocery prices climb
feed.summary: Kroger has introduced new savings initiatives for its customers in response to rising grocery prices. These efforts aim to provide financial relief and help shoppers manage their food budgets amidst climbing costs. The company is focusing on various programs to make groceries more affordable for its consumer base.

feed.title: Hyperscale Data: $50 Million Bitcoin Treasury Milestone Reached As AI Data Center Company Advances Toward $100 Million Goal
feed.summary: Hyperscale Data announced its Bitcoin treasury has surpassed $50 million for the second time, holding approximately 663.3130 Bitcoin. This milestone moves the company closer to its $100 million digital asset reserve goal, using both mining operations and market purchases. The company plans to continue deploying capital into Bitcoin and aims to divest Ault Capital Group in Q2 2027 to focus on data center operations and digital asset holdings.

feed.title: Warburg Pincus-Backed PDG Is Said to Tap Goldman for Stake Sale
feed.summary: Princeton Digital Group (PDG), an Asian data center operator backed by Warburg Pincus, has reportedly engaged Goldman Sachs Group Inc. for a strategic review that could lead to a stake sale. While the process is still preliminary, it indicates PDG is exploring options for new equity partners or other deal structures. No final decisions have been made, and the deliberations remain private.

feed.title: Why Coca-Cola has made World Cup TV ads one part of its sports marketing play
feed.summary: Coca-Cola's Powerade brand launched its "Power Your Fate" campaign for the FIFA World Cup 2026, featuring athletes and creators across 50 markets. The strategy emphasizes a social-first, 360-degree approach, integrating TV ads with platform-native content, athlete storytelling, and influencer collaborations. Coca-Cola aims to engage fans where they already are, utilizing both digital platforms and real-life activations to encourage user-generated content and shared experiences.

feed.title: Ainsworth names Matt Smith VP of marketing and product strategy
feed.summary: Ainsworth Game Technology Ltd has appointed Matt Smith as Vice President of Marketing and Product Strategy to strengthen its leadership team in North America. Smith, with over a decade of gaming industry experience including a tenure at IGT and Bellagio Resort & Casino, will lead marketing and product initiatives to expand the Ainsworth brand. The company's acting CEO, Ryan Comstock, highlighted Smith's operator insight and product leadership as a valuable addition expected to contribute positively to current product strategies and market position.

feed.title: Cathay General Bancorp (CATY) Q1 EPS Strength Reinforces Bulls’ High Margin Narrative
feed.summary: Cathay General Bancorp (CATY) reported a strong Q1 2026 with US$1.30 EPS and US$86.9 million net income, showcasing efficient revenue conversion with net profit margins in the low 40s. While bulls highlight improving earnings momentum and high profitability, bears point to significant commercial real estate exposure in California and the presence of over US$100 million in non-performing loans. The stock currently trades at a P/E of 11.1x with a 2.75% dividend yield, significantly below its DCF fair value estimate of US$119.76, though future growth forecasts are modest.

feed.title: Tencent and Alibaba in Talks to Invest in DeepSeek AI Startup | 2026 Funding Round - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. and Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. are reportedly in discussions to invest in Chinese AI startup DeepSeek's first funding round. Tencent has proposed acquiring up to a 20% stake, while DeepSeek, valued similarly to rivals like MiniMax Group Inc. (around $40 billion), is hesitant to give up that much control. Both tech giants are already investors in MiniMax and are vying for dominance in China's AI sector, keen to provide cloud computing services to burgeoning AI startups.

feed.title: Southwest Gas prices Centuri share sale at $19.50/share
feed.summary: Southwest Gas Holdings has priced an underwritten public offering of 8,500,000 shares of its wholly-owned subsidiary, Centuri Holdings, at $19.50 per share. The offering includes an option for underwriters to purchase an additional 1,275,000 shares. The expected closing date is April 29, 2026, and Centuri has applied to list its common stock on the NYSE under the symbol "CTRI."

feed.title: Invesco BulletShares 2026 Corporate Bond ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.0676
feed.summary: The Invesco BulletShares 2026 Corporate Bond ETF (BSCQ) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.0676 per share. This announcement provides investors with information regarding the upcoming payment from the ETF.

feed.title: ANDE (NASDAQ: ANDE) insider Patrick Bowe reports multiple sales, 03/16–04/22/2026
feed.summary: Patrick E. Bowe, an insider at Andersons, Inc. (NASDAQ: ANDE), reported multiple sales of common stock via Form 144 filings between March 16, 2026, and April 22, 2026. The filings detail seven separate dispositions, including the number of shares sold and the aggregate proceeds for each trade. Additionally, the filing notes a Restricted Stock Vesting event on February 14, 2024, related to compensation.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Keeps Hold Opinion On Shares Of Eqt Corp.
feed.summary: This article provides a research alert from CFRA, maintaining a "Hold" opinion on the shares of EQT Corp. The brief alert does not offer additional details but indicates CFRA's current stance on the company's stock.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Texas Instruments (TXN) and Teledyne Technologies (TDY)
feed.summary: Two analysts have issued bullish ratings for technology companies Texas Instruments (TXN) and Teledyne Technologies (TDY). TD Cowen analyst Joshua Buchalter set a Buy rating and $300.00 price target for Texas Instruments, while Joseph C Giordano, also from TD Cowen, maintained a Buy rating for Teledyne Technologies with a $750.00 price target. Both companies currently hold a Moderate Buy consensus rating from analysts, with Texas Instruments facing a slight downside from current levels and Teledyne Technologies showing an upside potential.

feed.title: Strategy Stock Rises 9.4% on Institutional Buy, Surpasses BlackRock as Top Bitcoin Holder - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Shares of Strategy surged by 9.4% following an institutional investor's purchase of 4.32 million shares worth $747 million and the company's announcement of becoming the largest corporate holder of Bitcoin, surpassing BlackRock. Strategy now holds 815,061 BTC after acquiring an additional 34,160 coins for approximately $2.54 billion. Analysts have raised price targets for the volatile stock, which though up 13.1% year-to-date, remains significantly below its 52-week high.

feed.title: Trimble Korea to Host BIM Innovation Conference 2026 in Seoul
feed.summary: Trimble Korea will host the BIM Innovation Conference 2026 in Seoul on April 28 to focus on the practical changes AI will bring to the built environment. The company plans to unveil new features of Tekla 2026 and introduce its agentic AI applications, including AI-driven automation for steel structure modeling and smart workflows connecting design and construction. This event aims to demonstrate how AI can generate business value across the entire construction lifecycle, from design to execution.

feed.title: Choice Hotels Canada reports record Q1 growth
feed.summary: Choice Hotels Canada has reported its strongest Q1 growth in over a decade, achieving a 34% year-on-year net room growth and a 20% revenue increase. This success follows the company's transition to a direct franchising model and an expansion of its branded portfolio, demonstrating significant development momentum in the Canadian market.

feed.title: ACES Stock Price, News & Analysis
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of ALPS Clean Energy ETF (ACES) stock, detailing its current price of $35.79 and a 64.0% gain over the past year. It includes performance charts, news, financial highlights (though most TTM data is unavailable), and short interest trends, noting a relatively low short interest indicating limited bearish sentiment. The article also mentions the recent news of the ETF transferring its listing to NYSE Arca, which coincided with positive price movement.

feed.title: Alarm.com (NASDAQ: ALRM) details 2026 director elections, auditor and say-on-pay
feed.summary: Alarm.com Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALRM) has announced the agenda for its upcoming June 3, 2026, annual stockholders' meeting. Key items for shareholder vote include the election of eight directors, the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor for 2026, and an advisory vote on executive compensation. The company's proxy statement highlights its 2025 financial performance, including a 9.2% increase in SaaS and license revenue to $689.4 million and a 7.6% rise in total revenue to $1.0112 billion, which underpins its pay-for-performance executive compensation philosophy.

feed.title: [RW] Amesite Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: Amesite Inc. has filed Form RW with the SEC, requesting the immediate withdrawal of its S-1 Registration Statement (File No. 333-295187). The company stated it has elected not to pursue the sale of securities contemplated by the Registration Statement at this time, and confirmed no securities were sold. The filing was made on April 23, 2026, and indicates a neutral impact and sentiment.

feed.title: Xiao-I to implement ADS ratio change
feed.summary: Xiao-I (AIXI) announced a change in the ratio of its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) to ordinary shares, moving from one ADS representing one-third of an ordinary share to one ADS representing 60 ordinary shares. This change, expected to be effective around May 11, will function as a one-for-twenty reverse ADS split for current ADS holders, proportionally increasing the ADS trading price. The company's ADSs will continue to trade on Nasdaq under "AIXI," with no impact on the underlying ordinary shares.

feed.title: Churchill Capital Corp X shareholders approve business combination with Infleqtion
feed.summary: Churchill Capital Corp X shareholders have approved the business combination with Infleqtion, a quantum technology company. This approval marks a significant step towards the merger of the two entities, paving the way for Infleqtion to become a publicly traded company.

feed.title: How GM helps fleets get ready to go electric
feed.summary: GM Fleet assists companies in transitioning to electric fleets through tools like the Electrification Analysis, which includes driver surveys and telematics analysis to create tailored EV roadmaps. This service helps address concerns like range anxiety and charging logistics, as demonstrated by companies like McKinstry and Delta Leasing. Both firms have successfully integrated Silverado EVs into their operations, reporting significant cost savings and adaptability even in extreme conditions.

feed.title: Academy Sports & Outdoors offering branded Mastercard
feed.summary: Academy Sports + Outdoors is launching a branded Mastercard credit card program. Cardholders will receive 5% back on Academy purchases, 2% back on gas and grocery, and 1% on all other purchases, with rewards redeemable for Academy merchandise.

feed.title: Share Repurchase Plan Initiated by Cathay General Bancorp (NASDAQ:CATY) Board of Directors
feed.summary: Cathay General Bancorp (NASDAQ:CATY) announced that its board has authorized a share repurchase plan. The article reports a repurchase amount of $150,000.00 billion and 4,164,630.6% of shares, which appear to be significant typos. This announcement follows better-than-expected Q1 earnings, with EPS of $1.29 and revenue of $213.2 million, and an increased quarterly dividend to $0.38 per share.

feed.title: First Trust TCW Securitized Plus ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.0800
feed.summary: The First Trust TCW Securitized Plus ETF (NASDAQ: FTSP) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.0800 per share. This distribution is payable on or about April 30, 2024, to shareholders of record as of April 23, 2024. The ex-dividend date is April 22, 2024.

Pace and an 8-K detailing the annual meeting results, including director elections and an expansion of the stock incentive plan. feed.title: Agenus Names BAP Pharma as Exclusive Global Partner for BOT+BAL Access Programs
feed.summary: Agenus Inc. has partnered exclusively with BAP Pharma to manage global access programs for its botensilimab (BOT) plus balstilimab (BAL) therapies. This collaboration aims to provide compliant, patient-focused access to BOT+BAL through authorized pathways, including France's AAC program and named-patient programs in other countries. The partnership will streamline operations and logistics for patients with serious cancers, addressing a growing global demand for these therapies.

feed.title: Insider Buying: Robert Wrocklage Acquires Shares of Badger Meter Inc (BMI)
feed.summary: Robert Wrocklage, Executive Vice President of North America Municipal Utility at Badger Meter Inc (BMI), recently purchased 1,000 shares, increasing his total holdings to 23,321 shares. This transaction is part of a broader trend of insider buying at BMI, with eight buys against four sells over the past year. The stock is currently trading at $122.35, and its price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.57 suggests it is significantly undervalued.

feed.title: Webuy Global Awards CEO Share-Based Pay and Sells High-Vote Stock in April 2026 Deals
feed.summary: Webuy Global's board approved granting CEO Bin Xue 300,000 Class A shares as 2026 supplemental compensation, valued at $351,000, which are subject to a 12-month lock-up. Additionally, Xue purchased 100,000 high-vote Class B ordinary shares for $117,000, increasing his voting influence. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates WBUY stock as "Underperform" due to poor financial performance and high leverage.

feed.title: Citi: BILIBILI-W (09626.HK) Ads Growth Momentum Strong; 1Q Results Expected to Be in Line
feed.summary: Citi Research projects BILIBILI-W (09626.HK) to report a 7% YoY revenue hike to RMB7.5 billion and a non-GAAP operating profit of RMB553 million for 1Q26, aligning with market consensus. Advertising revenue is expected to grow significantly due to expanded scenarios and AI efficiency, offsetting a projected decline in the game business. Citi maintains a Buy rating and US$27 target price on Bilibili (BILI.US), confident in strong advertising growth driving future profits.

feed.title: Ameris Bancorp reports Q1 EPS $1.63, consensus $1.55
feed.summary: Ameris Bancorp (ABCB) reported strong Q1 results, with EPS of $1.63, surpassing the consensus estimate of $1.55. CEO Palmer Proctor highlighted expanding ROA, return on average tangible common equity, and margin, alongside robust revenue, loan, and deposit growth. The company also engaged in significant share repurchases during the quarter.

feed.title: Newmont Corporation 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NYSE:NEM) 2026-04-23
feed.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) has released its Q1 2026 earnings call presentation. The company reported an EPS of $2.90, beating estimates by $0.73, and revenue of $7.31 billion, surpassing expectations by $741.70 million with a 45.85% year-over-year increase. This presentation accompanies their earnings call from April 23, 2026.

feed.title: ONEOK Inc To Go Ex-Dividend On May 4th, 2026 With 1.07 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: ONEOK Inc. (NYSE: OKE) is scheduled to go ex-dividend on May 4th, 2026, with a dividend payment of $1.07 per share. This information is important for investors who wish to be eligible for the upcoming dividend distribution.

feed.summary: This article states that Truist Securities has upgraded its rating for Host Hotels & Resorts (HST). No further details about the upgrade or the company are provided in the given snippet.
